title.en: STEAM TRAPS OR LIKE APPARATUS FOR DRAINING-OFF LIQUIDS FROM ENCLOSURES PREDOMINANTLY CONTAINING GASES OR VAPOURS
Steam traps or like apparatus for draining-off liquids from enclosures predominantly containing gases or vapours, e.g. gas lines, steam lines, containers
with valves controlled by excess or release of pressure
without moving parts other than hand valves, e.g. labyrinth type
specially adapted for steam lines of low pressure
Component parts; Accessories {(valves in general F16K)}
